name: Greek Spinach, Pasta and Toasted Almonds
recipeIngredient: 5 cup Loosely packed fresh spinach, cleaned and coarsely chopped
1 cup Defatted chicken stock -or vegetable stock
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, bring 4 quarts of water to a boil. Add the pasta and cook according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Spray with nonstick vegetable coating. When the skillet gets very hot, add the mushrooms, spreading them out thinly.
3. Cook for 1-2 minutes until browned. Toss and cook for 2 more minutes. You want them to brown without getting watery. Turn off the heat and reserve the mushrooms until the pasta is cooked.
4. When the pasta is al dente, drain in a colander and return it to the cooking pot. Toss with the olive oil.
5. Add the spinach, garlic, stock, olives, and the mushrooms. Toss well to mix.
6. Place on individual plates or a serving platter and top with feta cheese and the almonds.
